scripts.build:windows: bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 src/index.ts --outfile "dist/Microsoft 365 Admin CLI/m365-admin.exe" && cd dist && zip -r -9 "Microsoft 365 Admin CLI.zip" "Microsoft 365 Admin CLI" && shasum -a 256 "Microsoft 365 Admin CLI.zip" | cut -d ' ' -f 1 > "Microsoft 365 Admin CLI.zip.sha256"
